items.title: G2 Esports' $35M business blueprint: How the org profits whether fans love or hate them
items.content_text: G2 CEO Alban Dechelotte pulled back the curtain on the org's commercial engine at the Esports World Cup 2026 in Paris, revealing a $35M annual turnover built on diversified revenue and a deliberately borderless identity.

items.title: AI vs expert: Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini take on our LEC week one predictions
items.content_text: Claude, ChatGPT and Gemini each built a $10 LEC week one accumulator — see how their picks and odds stack up against our own expert's predictions.

items.title: Riot suspends NAVI streamer ardiis for transphobic Game Changers comments
items.content_text: After transphobic comments, ardiis will be unable to co-stream VCT matches for one month, but many fans believe the punishment isn't enough.

items.title: RORA Coach Midnight on facing TLPH early in MSC at EWC 2026: "Fortunate and unfortunate at the same time."

items.title: It’s time for soundproof booths to return to esports
items.content_text: After a Call of Duty Grand Final was heavily influenced by crowd behavior, we need to bring back soundproof booths in esports.

items.title: "Keep fighting for your dream": Team Vitality MLBB pro Vivian on overcoming challenges and judgement to become a top esports pro

items.title: PlayVS takes esports to 50,000 Scouts at the 2026 National Jamboree
items.content_text: PlayVS is rolling out a dedicated gaming arena at Scouting America's biggest youth gathering, running July 22–31 in West Virginia — part of a broader push to plant esports in unexpected spaces.

items.content_text: Esports Foundation's Hans Jagnow talks about the Esports World Cup's relocation, the changing perception of esports, and esports fandom.

items.title: Risk without reward: Counter-Strike 2's new sticker system threatens the entire esports scene's structure
items.content_text: Valve just made some big changes to the sticker system, causing Counter-Strike 2 teams to lose a ton of revenue. This could spell trouble.

items.title: Single-player games deserve more attention in esports
items.content_text: League of Legends and Counter-Strike 2 seem to get all the love, but single-player games deserve way more attention.
